fields.description: Default email address used as the sender when composing new messages.
fields.label: Default Email

fields.description: Automatically creates contact cards for new recipients after an email is sent.
fields.label: Create Contacts After Email Submit

fields.description: Automatically deletes the email from your mailbox after it is sent.
fields.label: Destroy Email After Submit

fields.description: Automatically delete newsletters after they are sent.
fields.label: Destroy Newsletter After Submit

fields.description: What to do with the sender when a message is marked as Junk. "Junk Sender's Mail" files their future mail into Junk; "Ask to Block Sender" prompts to block them outright.
fields.label: On Mark As Junk
fields.options:
Junk Sender's Mail
Ask to Block Sender

fields.description: Whether this account's JMAP identities are cached for your session.
fields.label: Has Cached JMAP Identities

fields.description: Whether this account's JMAP mailboxes are cached for your session.
fields.label: Has Cached JMAP Mailboxes

fields.description: Number of message blobs (bodies and attachments) cached for your session.
fields.label: Total Cached Blobs

fields.description: Number of mail messages cached for your session.
fields.label: Total Cached Mail Messages

fields.description: Number of contact cards cached for your session.
fields.label: Total Cached Contact Cards

fields.description: ID of the Sieve script that was active before a vacation auto-reply was enabled; it is re-activated when the vacation response is turned off.
fields.label: Last Active Sieve Script ID
